project: PRJ03246 - Balance Point Control - BPC - Celle - Unknown Well - MFC_ MTT
PRJ03246 - Balance Point Control - BPC - Celle - Unknown Well - MFC_ MTT
comment: LL arrived at hotel in Oberhaching. Met BPC crew and latest is they had issues with their run today, so that has pushed the ABI log to Thursday at the earliest. Plan for tomorrow will be to go to location and test the ABI equipment once it has arrived on location. Might not be able to test with BPC cable as they will be logging but can at least test with DLC.

project: PRJ03306 - Well Services Group (Exlog) - Exlog (WSG) - EN35 - PLT
comment:
WSG expect this job 1st week of June for 7-10 days between mobilization and Demob.
Client is Storengy. Well EN35.

The job is confirmed, tools mobilization also, not the run yet and is could be dependent on the clean out run from the 1st Coil run.

comment: After a good inflow test on the SPM. Decision has been made to continue and not rerun. Equipment to be packed today
